source: Derived from CultOnePagers2019 areas + AiG culture descriptions
note: Maps each AiG culture to available cults. 'primary' = most common/expected. 'secondary' = available but less typical. Culture aliases canonicalize older/source labels before lookup. Seven Mothers is a display grouping only; app selection uses cited individual 7 Mothers subcult records. Culture magic caveats live in references/aig-raw/culture-magic-profiles-aig.json.

page_citations.culture_descriptions: Adventures in Glorantha p.26-41; Praxian p.33-35; Sartarite (Heortling) p.37-39
page_citations.cult_area_data: Notes from Pavis Cult One-Pagers (2019 v5.2), individual cult area sections; reviewed corrections cite Yelmalio p.1-2, Arkat p.1, Pavis p.1, Zola Fel p.1, Waha p.1, Eiritha p.1, Storm Bull p.1, Foundchild p.1, Daka Fal p.1
page_citations.god_forgot_magic_caveat: Adventures in Glorantha p.30-31 (atheist culture; gods not worshipped; Rune Magic unavailable; Spirit Magic viewed as pointless; Folk Magic treated as diluted sorcery)
page_citations.culture_aliases: Adventures in Glorantha p.33-39 (Tarsh/Provincial Lunar and Sartarite/Heortling labels); references/aig-raw/cultures.json aliases
page_citations.seven_mothers_display_group: Notes from Pavis Cult One-Pagers (2019 v5.2), Lunar/7 Mothers individual subcult packets; no aggregate Seven Mothers app record is source-backed here

God Forgot.note: God Forgot is explicitly atheistic/secularist in AiG p.30-31: gods are not worshipped and Rune Magic is unavailable. The listed secondary cults are rare/manual non-default options with non-AiG provenance, especially Arkat sorcery access.

Telmori Hsunchen.note: Verified AiG Telmori Hsunchen culture pages support Korgatsu/Telmor animism but do not show a Rune cult package; raw Telmor cult data remains unmapped for automatic Telmori culture selection until separately reconciled.

Seven Mothers.note: Seven Mothers is preserved as a player-facing/source label; choose an individual 7 Mothers subcult record for app mechanics.

legacy_mapping_exemption.reason: Non-Waha culture/cult membership remains the reviewed legacy map from tracked one-pager area sections plus AiG culture descriptions; Waha/Praxian primary mapping is split out as verified evidence, and the rest remains partial provenance until AiG and per-cult page/block evidence are promoted.
